basic_details.job_title: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) Notification 2026 has been released on 06 July 2026 on the official website of Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc.(Computer Science/IT)/MCA with 50% marks and B.Ed with 50% marks or equivalent as per detailed criteria
qualification.details: Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT): M.Sc.(Computer Science/IT) or MCA from a recognized institution with at least 50% Marks OR M.E./M.Tech (Computer Science/IT) with at least 50% Marks AND B.Ed Degree from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Three year integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. OR Four year Integrated Degree with at least 50% marks from NCTE recognised institution Including B.Ed Component.

selection_process: Document Verification Personal Interaction Merit List based on Weightage
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://azamgarh.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.atal_awasiya_vidyalaya: M.Sc.(Computer Science/IT)/MCA with 50% marks and B.Ed with 50% marks or equivalent as per detailed criteria

content_sections.heading: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT): M.Sc.(Computer Science/IT) or MCA from a recognized institution with at least 50% Marks OR M.E./M.Tech (Computer Science/IT) with at least 50% Marks AND B.Ed Degree from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Three year integrated B.Ed.-M.Ed. OR Four year Integrated Degree with at least 50% marks from NCTE recognised institution Including B.Ed Component.

content_sections.heading: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Document Verification Personal Interaction Merit List based on Weightage

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://azamgarh.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Computer Teacher recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) post is 20-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Computer Teacher post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Sc.(Computer Science/IT) or MCA with 50% marks and a B.Ed degree with 50% marks, or equivalent qualifications as specified in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC, SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 36,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Computer Teacher post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Computer Teacher (Guest Faculty PGT) position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Computer Teacher recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, Personal Interaction, and a Merit List based on weightage.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website: https://azamgarh.nic.in.
